stories.title: Why does kinetic energy increase quadratically, not linearly, with speed?
stories.summary: A deep dive into why kinetic energy scales with the square of velocity — a fundamental relationship that shapes all of physics.

stories.title: WordStar: A Writer's Word Processor (1996)
